zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Arundel於1366年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親Sir John FitzAlan16歲，母親Eleanor Mautravers21歲。他和Alice Burley至少有4個女兒。他去世於1419年6月3日在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特梅德瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Arundel于1366年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，他的父亲Sir John FitzAlan16岁，母亲Eleanor Mautravers21岁。他和Alice Burley至少有4个女儿。他去世于1419年6月3日在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特梅德瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Arundel was born in 1366, in Arundel, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John FitzAlan, was 16 and his mother, Eleanor Mautravers, was 21. He had at least 4 daughters with Alice Burley. He died on 3 June 1419, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Medway, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Arundel est né en 1366, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John FitzAlan, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Mautravers, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Alice Burley. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1419, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Medway, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Arundel 1366 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John FitzAlan 16 und seine Mutter Eleanor Mautravers 21. Er hatte mit Alice Burley mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juni 1419 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England und wurde in Medway, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Arundel è nato il nel 1366 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John FitzAlan, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Mautravers, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Alice Burley. Morì il 3 giugno 1419, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Medway, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Arundelが1366年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir John FitzAlanは16歳，母Eleanor Mautraversは21歳であった。彼はAlice Burleyとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1419年6月3日にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントメドワイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Arundel(이)가 1366년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John FitzAlan(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Mautravers(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Alice Burley(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 6월 3일 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 메드웨이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Arundel nasceu em 1366, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John FitzAlan, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Mautravers, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Alice Burley. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1419, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Medway, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Arundel родился в 1366 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John FitzAlan было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Mautravers, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Alice Burley. Он умер 3 июня 1419 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности медвеи, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Arundel nació en 1366, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John FitzAlan, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Eleanor Mautravers, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Alice Burley. Murió el 3 de junio de 1419, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Medway, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
